titleStmt.title: SII 30.126: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 126. (A.R. No. 204 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-On the north and west walls Rājāraja-Chōḻa I: year 27: 1012 A.D.

summary.p: Records the gift of ten kaḻañju of gold for burning a perpetual lamp to the temple of Śri Pōndaiyāḻvār at Parākramachōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya village in Dāmar-nāḍu of Dāmark-kōṭṭam a subdivision of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

The ten kaḻañju was utilized to purchase ninety sheep to burn the lamp, and the shepherds of Tillaichēry agreed to supply ghee daily to the temple. This gift was left in charge of the gaṇapperumakkaḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyuntaṉak keyurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nā
ṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyuṅ nuḷampapāṭiyun=taṭikai pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅkaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamu miraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamun=ti
ṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṇṇeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷḷellā yāṇṭu toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiñarai tecukoḷ śrī korājarājakesaripanmarāna śrī korājarājadevaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu tāmark koṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭuk karaikkoṭṭu brahmadeyam pārākramacoḻa ccaturvveti maṅkalattu śrī pontaiyāḷvār śrīkāryya
ṅ kaṭaikkāṇkiṉṟa Eyiṟṟiruppontai nilayakramavittaṉum nal ttiruveṅkaṭa mātava sarvvakratuvum maṇarppāttu mituṇi Udāśaṟ krama vittaṉum vāriyamāka
trairājya ghaṭikā madhyastaṉāṉa veṅkaṭavaṉ tirivikramanāṉa Eḻāyiravaṉ kaṇakkākavum bhāradvāji ta perumāṉ brahmāṇi kāmak koṭiccāṉi taṉ perāl tirunan=tā viḷak
karaiyiṉukku Uṭkoḷāka Ippoṉ mukkaḻañcaraiye nālu mañcāṭiyumāṉu m śivabrāhmaṇaṉ paṭṭa [ śivaṉ] koṇṭa kācu pattiṉāl poṉ Aiñkaḻañce kālum tirume
ykākkum veḷḷāḷaṉ Oṟṟipemmāṉai daṇṭamākak koṇṭa kācu 1 ṉāl Araikkaḻañcey kuṉṟiyum Ittevaṟku poli vāriyāl mutalāṉa poṉṉiliṭṭa poṉ Oṉ
patu mañcāṭiyu māṟumāvumākap poṉ patiṉ kaḻañcukkum koṇṭa cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟum Ittevaṟku cantrādityavan tirunan=tā viḷakku 1 nukku OṉṟāṉālRead- oṉṟiṉālnicatam
ney Uḻakkāka Aṭṭakkaṭavanāka tillaicceriyirukku miṭaiyaṉ A ṇiliyāṉa tiruppo maṉṟāṭi vicamiruviṭṭaṉ Ivai Avvāṇṭu śrīkāryyaṅkaṭai
kkāṇakkaṭava kaṇapperumakkaḷey muṭṭāmai Erippikkaṭavārkaḷ Ivai Eḻāyiravaneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
